key.name: focus-window-left
key.description: Keybinding to focus the nearest window to the left of the current window

key.name: focus-window-right
key.description: Keybinding to focus the nearest window to the right of the current window

key.name: focus-window-up
key.description: Keybinding to focus the nearest window above the current window

key.name: focus-window-down
key.description: Keybinding to focus the nearest window below the current window
